text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: First off, there's something I wanna show you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week hands me a piece of paper with the
words "Become the top Umamusume in all of
Japan!" written boldly with a calligraphy brush.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear she ran out of space, as her letters get
smaller towards the end. While it may not win any
special awards, it screams "Special Week."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, whaddya think? It's kind of like my official
New Year's resolution!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This year is a super important one for me. I'll be
taking on the Classics, after all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wrote this as soon as the new year began. It's a
way of reminding myself that my goals haven't
changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her calligraphy again, I can almost feel
the intensity of her desire to become number one!
choice_data_list: Let's become the best in Japan—together!
Let's become the best in Japan—together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Having you with me is even more
reassuring!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...While we're at it, I was wondering if you could
give me some advice.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What do I need to do to become the top
Umamusume in all of Japan?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know that I wanna become the number one
Umamusume, but I don't actually know how to
go about accomplishing that goal...
choice_data_list: Let's work on improving your strong points!
You should be mindful of your health!
You should learn the top techniques in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My strong points, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right! If at least one of my strengths is
better than everyone else's, then I'll be able to
run with total confidence!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll also naturally get the hang of when to take
advantage of my strengths during a race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The very act of searching for her strengths helps
contribute to Special Week's growth.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I need to take care of my body! If I
can't run due to injury or illness, then it'll all be
for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to take regular breaks and get
some proper rest every night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... That means I gotta eat a lot when I'm
hungry too, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and I stop by the food stalls and
get something to eat on the way to the shrine for
New Year's. She starts the year full of vigor.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Techniques, huh... I guess I do need them to win...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But that sounds kinda hard! How do I even go
about learning something like that?
choice_data_list:
To start with, why don't you try to mimic the
techniques of other talented racers?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I think I can do that! I'll see how my friends
race and try to copy them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Special Week refines her tactics by
mimicking the techniques of racers she's studied
during pair running and in videos.
